settings.heading: Browse partner offers by business category.
settings.hero_text: Find public partner offers across finance, insurance, connectivity, HR, operations, technology and other practical business categories.
settings.panel_text: Each category helps you browse relevant partner offers and filter the main offers directory.
settings.list_text: Choose a category to filter the main partner offers directory.
settings.cta_text: Browse practical partner offers designed to help businesses compare tools, services and benefits.
